name: inde wild
audience: Primarily millennial and Gen Z women, especially those in the South Asian diaspora or interested in Ayurvedic and science-backed skincare
vibe: Modern, conscious, and culturally rooted; blends minimal, clinical aesthetics with warm, Indian-inspired storytelling and a strong emphasis on authenticity and inclusivity
productType: Skincare products such as serums, sunscreens, and treatments that combine Ayurvedic-inspired ingredients with dermatology-led, clinically tested formulations
purpose: To create skincare that bridges traditional Indian beauty wisdom and modern science, offering effective, safe, and culturally resonant products for melanin-rich and sensitive skin
ideology: Holistic, East-meets-West approach to beauty; celebrates brown and diverse skin tones, champions self-acceptance and representation, prioritises clean formulations and transparency, and positions skincare as both ritual and self-care grounded in heritage and evidence-based science.
